metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Authentication ASIM parser for Palo Alto Prisma Cloud Compute
properties.query:
let parser = (
    disabled: bool = false,
    pack: bool = false
) {
Syslog
| where not(disabled)
| where ProcessName == "Twistlock-Console"
| parse-kv SyslogMessage as (
    ['time']:string,
    ['type']:string,
    id:string,
    log_type:string,
    username:string,
    source_ip:string,
    api:string,
    status:string
)
with (pair_delimiter=' ', kv_delimiter='=', quote='"')
| where ['type'] == "management_audit" and log_type == "login"
| invoke _ASIM_ResolveDvcFQDN('HostName')
| extend
    EventStartTime = coalesce(todatetime(['time']), EventTime, TimeGenerated),
    EventEndTime = coalesce(todatetime(['time']), EventTime, TimeGenerated),
    EventResult = case(
        status == "successful login attempt", "Success",
        status in ("invalid credentials", "expired token"), "Failure",
        "NA"
    ),
    EventResultDetails = case(
        status == "invalid credentials", "No such user or password",
        status == "expired token", "Session expired",
        ""
    ),
    EventSeverity = case(
        SeverityLevel =~ "info", "Informational",
        SeverityLevel =~ "warning", "Medium",
        SeverityLevel =~ "error", "High",
        SeverityLevel =~ "critical", "High",
        "Informational"
    ),
    SrcIpAddr = iff(isnotnull(parse_ipv4(source_ip)) or isnotempty(parse_ipv6(source_ip)), source_ip, ""),
    DvcIpAddr = iff(isnotnull(parse_ipv4(HostIP)) or isnotempty(parse_ipv6(HostIP)), HostIP, ""),
    DvcId = _ResourceId,
    DvcIdType = iff(isnotempty(_ResourceId), "AzureResourceId", ""),
    TargetUsername = username,
    TargetUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(username), "Simple", ""),
    TargetAppName = "Prisma Cloud Compute",
    TargetAppType = "Service",
    EventUid = _ItemId
| extend
    TargetHostname = DvcHostname,
    TargetDomain = DvcDomain,
    TargetDomainType = DvcDomainType,
    TargetFQDN = DvcFQDN,
    Src = source_ip,
    IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
    Dst = coalesce(DvcFQDN, DvcHostname, TargetAppName),
    Dvc = coalesce(DvcFQDN, DvcHostname, TargetAppName),
    User = TargetUsername,
    Application = TargetAppName,
    AdditionalFields = iff(
        pack,
        bag_pack(
            "MG", MG,
            "HostIP", HostIP,
            "HostName", HostName,
            "Computer", Computer,
            "Facility", Facility,
            "ProcessName", ProcessName,
            "ProcessID", ProcessID,
            "SourceSystem", SourceSystem,
            "WorkspaceId", TenantId,
            "MessageId", id
        ),
        dynamic({})
    )
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Type,
    EventCount = int(1),
    EventStartTime,
    EventEndTime,
    EventType = "Logon",
    EventResult,
    EventResultDetails,
    EventOriginalType = ['type'],
    EventOriginalSubType = log_type,
    EventOriginalResultDetails = status,
    EventSeverity,
    EventOriginalSeverity = SeverityLevel,
    EventUid,
    EventMessage = SyslogMessage,
    EventProduct = "Prisma Cloud Compute",
    EventVendor = "Palo Alto",
    EventSchema = "Authentication",
    EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.4",
    LogonMethod = iff(api == "/api/v1/authenticate", "Username & Password", "Other"),
    TargetUsername,
    TargetUsernameType,
    User,
    SrcIpAddr,
    Src,
    IpAddr,
    TargetAppName,
    TargetAppType,
    Application,
    TargetHostname,
    TargetDomain,
    TargetDomainType,
    TargetFQDN,
    Dst,
    DvcId,
    DvcIdType,
    DvcIpAddr,
    DvcHostname,
    DvcDomain,
    DvcDomainType,
    DvcFQDN,
    DvcOs = SourceSystem,
    Dvc,
    AdditionalFields
};
parser(disabled=disabled, pack=pack)
